summary: An FBI electronic communication documents an October 2024 interview with a redacted individual who reported observing lights near their property beginning in November 2021, including one instance where a single light split into two or three lights forming a triangular pattern for about ten minutes. The interviewee also described a 1996 incident where a vehicle's electronics reportedly shut down after being illuminated by a large light, and stated they used ADS-B flight data to try to rule out aircraft as the source of the sightings.
